title: Calamagrostis villarsii
taxonomy: Calamagrostis villarsii is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Calamagrostis and is a type of perennial grass. The species is native to mountainous regions, particularly in the Mediterranean area. Calamagrostis villarsii is a member of the subfamily Pooideae, which includes many species of grasses. The classification of Calamagrostis villarsii is further supported by its botanical name, which indicates its scientific classification.
